concerns.detail: Uses vulgar insult '一点碧莲都不要了' (shameless/without any face) to attack people defending the professor as 'shills'
concerns.excerpt: 洗地侠真的丢人啊，一点碧莲都不要了

concerns.detail: Uses disability slur '像是智障' (like a retard) and unsupported speculation about childhood trauma to attack a professor's intelligence
concerns.excerpt: 智力水平有点问题，交流起来像是智障

concerns.detail: Unsupported character judgment using strong insult '非常恶臭的圈子' (extremely foul/stinky circle) to describe research communities
concerns.excerpt: bo li、anima都是非常恶臭的圈子
